title: The Battle for the Baratie Escalates
description: On pages 22–22, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This chojin, who seems somehow cool despite having the head of a panda, is the creation of ODA-sensei, whose work "one piece" is also currently being published in weekly chosen jump.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Comments when he was a baby, he was discarded in a bamboo grove and raised by Panda. This supervillan told people, "I have seen Princess Kaguya," but no one believed him, and he was bullied in return, hence increasing his resolve to become stronger.

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
